_doc: Tunable parameters for brain/sleep_mode.py. See docs/AVA_FEATURE_ADDITIONS_2026-05.md §1.
_default_duration_doc: 6 hours, used when sleep is requested without an explicit duration.
_session_fullness_duration_doc: 30 minutes, used when session-fullness trigger fires (this is a memory-compile sleep, not full overnight).

fullness_thresholds._doc: Composite fullness scoring + when to fire the autonomous sleep trigger.
fullness_thresholds._suppress_doc: After firing, suppress retriggering for this many seconds (avoid trigger-flap if sleep entry doesn't drop the score immediately).
fullness_thresholds._turn_cap_doc: Number of conversation turns since last sleep that maps to score=1.0.

fullness_weights._doc: Weights summing to 1.0. Re-tune as wiring matures (Ollama context fill currently a placeholder).

schedule._doc: Default sleep window. Wraps midnight when start>end. Defers on active conversation.
schedule._min_uptime_doc: Don't fire schedule trigger within N seconds of process start (avoids sleep-on-boot if user starts late at night).

decay._doc: Emotion decay multipliers per state. Applied on top of temporal_sense.passive_decay_per_second.

phase2._tick_budget_doc: How long one Phase-2 pass runs before yielding back to the tick loop. Lets the heartbeat check wake target / decay frequently.

wake._default_estimate_doc: Initial wake-time estimate; tightens as Phase 3 history accumulates via temporal_sense.calibrate_from_history(kind='sleep_phase3').
wake._wind_down_doc: Reserve this much before wake_target for Phase 3 + wake transition. Replaced by historical median once 3+ samples exist.
